instruction: Open System Settings, go to Appearance, and switch to {THEME} mode.
source: cove-original (design 047 §9 slice 4, §10 Settings template); Tier-A defaults+cfprefsd (§7)

args: if [ {BASELINE} = Dark ]; then defaults write -g AppleInterfaceStyle -string Dark; else defaults delete -g AppleInterfaceStyle 2>/dev/null || true; fi; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
if [ {THEME} = Dark ]; then defaults write -g AppleInterfaceStyle -string Dark; else defaults delete -g AppleInterfaceStyle 2>/dev/null || true; fi; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; defaults read -g AppleInterfaceStyle 2>/dev/null || echo Light
